title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
summary: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
whyItMatters: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
